hero.badge: Digital Companion for Bangladesh's Micro Businesses
hero.title: Paper ledgers are over, {highlight}
hero.description: Managing your shop's accounts is now as easy as water. Record your daily transactions just by speaking — no typing needed.

features.sectionTitle: All Shop Tasks in One Place
features.sectionSubtitle: The most modern technology now in your hands
features.voiceDescription: Update stock, collect dues, and record sales instantly with voice commands — no typing hassle.
features.dueDescription: Our AI smart system helps collect dues by sending automatic messages to customers.
features.stockDescription: DokaniAI alerts you before products run out.
features.securityDescription: Your data stays fully secure and encrypted.
features.reportsDescription: View complete daily profit & loss accounts in one click.

pricing.label: Pricing Plans
pricing.title: The Right Plan for Your Business
pricing.subtitle: Get all premium features at affordable prices

t1.quote: Keeping accounts in notebooks used to take so much time. Now I just speak and DokaniAI organizes everything.
t1.name: Abdul Jabbar

t2.quote: No need to remind customers about dues anymore, automatic messages are sent. Saves me a lot of time.
t2.name: Rahul Ahmed

t3.quote: The app is so easy to use that even my shop employees can input everything effortlessly.
t3.name: Sumaiya Parveen

footer.copyright: © 2024 DokaniAI. Empowering Bangladesh's Micro-Shops with Amanat.
